name: Crusty Beef Casserole
recipeIngredient: 10 oz nonfat or low-fat cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Brown meat and onions in a large skillet over medium heat until the meat is cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
3. Add spaghetti sauce with mushrooms; stir to combine and heat for an additional 2-3 minutes.
4. In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, spread half of the noodles evenly across the bottom.
5. Distribute half of the sauce mixture and half of the cheese over the noodles.
6. Sprinkle seasoned salt to taste.
7. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients: noodles, sauce, and cheese on top.
8. Cover the dish tightly with foil or place in an airtight container.
9. Bake for 1 hour at 325°F, until heated through and bubbly.
10. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
Makes 2 casseroles. Can be doubled or halved. Freezes well.
